# Meshtools3d parameter file
# Generated by imatools.m3dutils 

[segmentation]
seg_dir = /data/segs
seg_name = heart.inr
mesh_from_segmentation = 1
boundary_relabeling = 0

[meshing]
facet_angle = 25
facet_size = 0.5
facet_distance = 0.1
cell_rad_edge_ratio = 2
cell_size = 0.6
rescaleFactor = 1000

[laplacesolver]
abs_toll = 1e-06
rel_toll = 1e-06
itr_max = 700
dimKrilovSp = 500
verbose = 1

[others]
eval_thickness = 0

[output]
outdir = /data/output_v2
name = result
out_medit = 0
out_vtk = 1
out_carp = 0
out_vtk_binary = 1
out_carp_binary = 0
out_potential = 1
